title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Ceva Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Ceva Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Ceva Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ceva Logistics India:
Ceva Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ceva Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
